negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. Overall, the video is of poor quality.
name: human_193
prompt: A wide shot captures a soccer field within an empty stadium, featuring tiered seating and vibrant green grass under a clear, bright sky. A young boy in a dark blue soccer uniform stands poised to take a penalty kick, wearing white socks and dark blue cleats. The ball is positioned just in front of him, and he takes a few slow steps forward, gaining momentum before running towards it. He swings his leg back and kicks the ball with force, sending it pitching towards the goal. The goalkeeper, dressed in light blue, is crouched low in front of the goalpost, ready to defend. As the ball flies through the air, the goalkeeper leaps into action, running to his left side in an attempt to block it. The scene concludes with the goalkeeper still in motion, having just made contact with the ball, which is now in flight towards the goal.
